finding_results.notes: Aligned the Gloria-to-apartment leg to the continuity sheet's fifteen-minute distance and preserved the separate Lakeview-to-apartment twenty-five-minute commute math.
finding_results.summary: The post-Gloria transit beat now matches established continuity without disturbing the chapter's larger economic-and-commute pressure logic.

finding_results.notes: Added an on-page Delvecchio turn interruption before Harry's room, then specified the half-started tramadol cup and resumed count before Harry catches the extra half-tab.
finding_results.summary: Harry's correction now pays off a visible, concrete disruption instead of relying on retrospective explanation after the reveal.

finding_results.notes: Rebuilt Lola's first exchange from scratch around warmth, tremor-aware domestic chatter, Tammy familiarity, and daughter-card drift, avoiding the calibration-line beat order.
finding_results.summary: Lola's introduction now feels character-spoken rather than assembled from style-bible calibration material.

summary: Revised chapter 1 to fix the Gloria commute continuity error, make Harry's tramadol miscount arise from a dramatized interruption before his lucid catch, and replace Lola's borrowed opening exchange with a fresh voice-true introduction.
